title: gitzip hardening + Path A: Agent Notes DB live
decisions: Hardened gitzip-push before Three Agents Demo (blocking cleared). Added create_database, append_row, append_note to notion-ops. Provisioned Agent Notes DB via create_database op. Registered as G-010 BRAIN in gist registry. append_note is the canonical session-end write primitive going forward.
open_questions: When to build brain.json read primitive (G-010 gist export Action)? Alice still needs to ship: adapter_ref QA.Stone amendment, G-008 ALERT gist, Charlie agent slot, notion-ops QA.Stone SKILL Stone registration.
